attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT XXOPL_LINES.LINE_FLOW_ID, 
    CAST(COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.HEADER_ID,XXOPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF) AS BIGINT) HEADER_ID, /*This Column is Modified for GROGU April Release*/ 
    CAST(COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.LINE_ID,XXOPL_LINES.LINE_REF_NUMBER) AS BIGINT) LINE_ID, /*This Column is Modified for GROGU April Release*/ 
    COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,'-999'),
    XXOPL_LINES.ERP_LINE_ID, XXOPL_LINES.ORG_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.ORDERED_ITEM, XXOPL_LINES.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
    XXOPL_LINES.ITEM_CATEGORY, XXOPL_LINES.LINE_NUMBER,
    XXOPL_LINES.LINE_TYPE, XXOPL_LINES.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
    XXOPL_LINES.ORDERED_QUANTITY, XXOPL_LINES.CANCELLED_QUANTITY,
    XXOPL_LINES.USAGE_QUANTITY, XXOPL_LINES.OFFER_QUANTITY,
    XXOPL_LINES.PRICING_QTY_TO, XXOPL_LINES.MINOR_LINE_AMT,
    XXOPL_LINES.OFFER_UNIT_NET_PRICE, XXOPL_LINES.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
    XXOPL_LINES.EXT_NET_PRICE, XXOPL_LINES.MAX_UNIT_SALEPRICE,
    XXOPL_LINES.UNIT_LIST_PRICE, XXOPL_LINES.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
    XXOPL_LINES.ROUNDED_UNIT_NET_PRICE, XXOPL_LINES.NET_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG,
    XXOPL_LINES.CHARGE_TYPE, XXOPL_LINES.PRICE_LIST_VERSION,
    XXOPL_LINES.BILLING_MODEL, XXOPL_LINES.DELIVERY_METHOD,
    XXOPL_LINES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, XXOPL_LINES.INSTALL_SITEUSE_ID,
     XXOPL_LINES.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID, 
 XXOPL_LINES.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID, XXOPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_SUBSCRIPTION_ID, XXOPL_LINES.PROVISION_REFERENCE_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.REFERENCED_ID, XXOPL_LINES.PROVISION_REQUIRED,
    XXOPL_LINES.ACTION_TYPE, XXOPL_LINES.ACTION_SUB_TYPE,
    XXOPL_LINES.SELL_TYPE, XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_RECURRING_REVENUE,
    XXOPL_LINES.INITIAL_TERM, XXOPL_LINES.RENEWAL_TERM,
    XXOPL_LINES.PREPAY_TERM, XXOPL_LINES.TRUE_UP_TERM,
    XXOPL_LINES.INITIAL_TERM_TO, XXOPL_LINES.PREPAY_TERM_TO,
    XXOPL_LINES.TERM_LENGTH, XXOPL_LINES.QUOTE_NUMBER,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.REQUESTED_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.CONTRACT_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.CONTRACT_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.CHARGE_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.CHARGE_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.ESTIMATED_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.MANUAL_ACCEPTED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
 XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
    XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOID, XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEID,
    XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID, XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
    XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_CHANNELID, XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
    XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEID, XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
    XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID, XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_CHANNELID,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.CREATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
 XXOPL_LINES.CREATED_BY,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
 XXOPL_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
    XXOPL_LINES.CANCELLATION_REASON, XXOPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
    XXOPL_LINES.RATE_TABLE_NAME, XXOPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_MSG,
    XXOPL_LINES.RATE_TABLE_URL, XXOPL_LINES.PO_LINE_REFERENCE,
    XXOPL_LINES.CONTRACT_NUMBER, 
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.SERVICE_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.SERVICE_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
 XXOPL_LINES.LICENSE_NUMBER,
    XXOPL_LINES.BUNDLE_ID, XXOPL_LINES.EXTENDED_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
    XXOPL_LINES.BUNDLE_TYPE, XXOPL_LINES.FULFILLMENT_SYSTEM,
    XXOPL_LINES.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN_AMOUNT, XXOPL_LINES.BUSINESS_SCENARIO,
    XXOPL_LINES.ECC_NUM, XXOPL_LINES.LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
    XXOPL_LINES.RENEW_COUNTER, XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
    XXOPL_LINES.FULFILLMENT_METHOD, XXOPL_LINES.AUTO_ACCEPT,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.LEADTIME_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)), 
 XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_SUB_CREDITS,
    XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NET_PRICE, 
 CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.ESHIP_CONFIRM_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    XXOPL_LINES.ACTIVATION_SYSTEM, XXOPL_LINES.RENEW_LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
    XXOPL_LINES.BUNDLE_LINE, XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_SUB_CREDITS,
    -999 UNIQUE_ID, XXOPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.RENEW_LEADTIME_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),  
 XXOPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NP_EXCL_CREDIT,
    XXOPL_LINES.UNIT_NETPRICE_INCL_CREDIT, 
 CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.END_COMPLETED_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    XXOPL_LINES.ORIGIN_SERVER, XXOPL_LINES.IMRR,
    XXOPL_LINES.LEGACY_UNIQUE_ID, XXOPL_LINES.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
    XXOPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_LINE_REF_NUMBER, XXOPL_LINES.ARR,
    XXOPL_LINES.NRR, XXOPL_LINES.ON_PREMISE_ROLE,
    XXOPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_NUMBER, XXOPL_LINES.REMOVED_LINE_FLAG ,
    CAST('1900/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
    'UNKNOWN' TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
    XXOPL_LINES.HYBRID_OFFER_FLG,
    XXOPL_LINES.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
    CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.REQUESTED_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
    XXOPL_LINES.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT,
    XXOPL_LINES.PRICING_TERM     ,       /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */
    XXOPL_LINES.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER /* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19 */,
    /*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
    XXOPL_LINES.MIGRATION_FLAG ,    
    XXOPL_LINES.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER , 
    XXOPL_LINES.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID, 
    XXOPL_LINES.MIGRATED_DEAL_ID  ,
    /*BELOW COLUMNS ADDED AS A PART OF jUNE2019 Try and Buy RELEASE*/
   XXOPL_LINES.CANCEL_TYPE,
   XXOPL_LINES.TRIAL_PERIOD_DURATION,
   ---999 AS TRIAL_PERIOD_DURATION,
   CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.EXPIRATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EXPIRATION_DATE,
   --CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EXPIRATION_DATE,
   CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.RTR_ELIGIBLE, '=' ) AS RTR_ELIGIBLE,
   XXOPL_LINES.TRUE_FORWARD_FLAG,
   COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
   XXOPL_LINES.APPLIED_BUYING_PROGRAM,
   COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.ELA_FLAG,'N') AS ELA_FLAG,
   XXOPL_LINES.TRANSFER_FLAG,
   COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.OPPORTUNITY_LINE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID,
   COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.CAPTURE_ORDER_LINE_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_LINE_ID,
   XXOPL_LINES.ORIGINAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
   XXOPL_LINES.ORIGINAL_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   XXOPL_LINES.REMAINING_TERM, /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
   XXOPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_REMAINING_TERM /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
     /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
   ,XXOPL_LINES.MAGIC_KEY

     /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
   ,XXOPL_LINES.ACV_FLAG
   ,XXOPL_LINES.ITEM_ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG AS ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG
   ,XXOPL_LINES.ACV_AMOUNT  
   /* END OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
   ,CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.TERM_START_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
   ,CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.TERM_END_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))
   ,XXOPL_LINES.TERM_BOUND_CREDIT AS TERM_BOUND_CREDIT /* Q1FY21 Annuity Rel */
   ,XXOPL_LINES.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLAG AS PERIODIC_BILLING_FLG /* Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
   ,XXOPL_LINES.CANCELLED_FLAG
   ,XXOPL_LINES.REQUEST_DATE
   ,XXOPL_LINES.SHIPMENT_NUMBER
   ,XXOPL_LINES.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
   ,XXOPL_LINES.OPTION_NUMBER  
   ,XXOPL_LINES.ORDER_NUMBER   
   ,XXOPL_LINES.CISCO_SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE
  ,XXOPL_LINES.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE, 'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.SHIPPED_QUANTITY, 0.000000) 
,XXOPL_LINES.INVOICED_QUANTITY
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.RELATED_SKU_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS RELATED_SKU_NAME
 /*Q3FY21 Annuity release*/   
 ,CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE    
 ,XXOPL_LINES.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM
,XXOPL_LINES.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE
,XXOPL_LINES.ITEM_TYPE /* CBM changes */
,XXOPL_LINES.EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG /*Q3FY21 Annuity release*/
/* ADDED BELOW TWO AS PART OF CBM MAY REL */
,XXOPL_LINES.MFG_PO_ORG_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.SHIP_FROM_ORGID_CLOUD
/* Added as part of Athena June REl*/
,XXOPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_FULFILLMENT_MAPPING
,XXOPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_MODEL
,XXOPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_BUNDLE_TYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_PERCENTAGE
,XXOPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP_ID  /*Added as part of Athena Sep release */
,XXOPL_LINES.FLEXUP_FLAG
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.MASTER_AGREEMENT_ID ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGREEMENT_ID
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.COMMIT_STATUS ,'UNKNOWN') AS ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.MULTI_SUITE_DISCOUNT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.MULTI_POOL_DISCOUNT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.MULTI_ENROLLMENT_DISCOUNT ,0.00) AS ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT
,XXOPL_LINES.REFERENCE_TRANSACTION_ID  /* Added as part of Q1FY22 Annuity Oct release --mahhr*/
,CASE WHEN XXOPL_LINES.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG = 'Yes' THEN 'Y'
   ELSE COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG,'N') END SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.USER_INTENT,'UNKNOWN') AS USER_INTENT /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG,'N') AS IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM,'UNKNOWN') AS THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.ATR_LINK_ID,-999) AS ATR_LINK_ID/*feb13th iACV*/
,(CASE WHEN XXOPL_LINES.SOURCE_APP ='EA-DIGITIZATION' THEN COALESCE(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.SOURCE_APP_REF_ID AS BIGINT) ,-999) ELSE -999 END)
 AS SK_EA_DIGITIZATION_PROPOSAL_ID/*feb13th iACV*/
,COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT,0) AS FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT /*Added as part of CBM March Rel*/
,XXOPL_LINES.TOPMODEL_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*This Column is Added for GROGU April Release*/
,XXOPL_LINES.PLAN_NAME /*This Column is Added for GROGU April Release*/
,XXOPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
,XXOPL_LINES.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,XXOPL_LINES.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*added as part of Firestorm & Omega March 23 release*/
,XXOPL_LINES.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG
,XXOPL_LINES.ANCHOR_CONTRACT_NUMBER
,XXOPL_LINES.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_CONFIRMDATE
,XXOPL_LINES.ESTIMATE_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE
,XXOPL_LINES.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
,XXOPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
,XXOPL_LINES.PROVISION_INFO_EMAIL
,XXOPL_LINES.BUYING_PROGRAM_TRANSACTION_TYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.ENTITLEMENT_TYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.DUO_ACCOUNT_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.ACTION /*Added as part of EPIC 8216 */
,XXOPL_LINES.PRICE_PROTECTION
,XXOPL_LINES.ITEM_QUANTITY_CHANGE
,XXOPL_LINES.PRODUCT_COVERAGE_LINE_IDS 
,XXOPL_LINES.LINK_SO_CONTEXT    
,XXOPL_LINES.COVERED_PRODUCT_SO_NUMBER  
,XXOPL_LINES.PO_NUMBER
,XXOPL_LINES.TRANSACTION_TYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.BPA_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.SERVICE_ONLY_PURCHASE 
,XXOPL_LINES.CX_SUPPORT_SUB_TYPE  
/*added below attributes as part of AIP Splunk June 2025 release*/ 
,XXOPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_DESCRIPTION
,XXOPL_LINES.PARTNER_INVOLVEMENT 
,CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.INVOICE_DATE AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) INVOICE_DATE
,XXOPL_LINES.SEASONAL_YEAR
,XXOPL_LINES.CHANGE_SUBTYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,XXOPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,XXOPL_LINES.RENEWAL_TYPE
,XXOPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
,XXOPL_LINES.TRANSACTION_CODE
 FROM 
   (SEL * FROM $$ETLVWDB.ST_SI_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL    
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CAST(COALESCE(LINE_ID,LINE_REF_NUMBER) AS BIGINT) ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1) XXOPL_LINES
   /*LINE_ID Column Expression in PARTITION BY is Modified for GROGU April Release*/
   WHERE 
   --XXOPL_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE IN ('SQL COMPUPDATE','INSERT') AND
    --AND  COALESCE(XXOPL_LINES.BOOKING_SOURCE,'OPL')<>'CG1'
   CAST(CAST(XXOPL_LINES.EDW_CREATE_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) 
   >CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))

SELECT OPL_LINES.LINE_FLOW_ID,
  OPL_LINES.HEADER_ID,
  OPL_LINES.LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,
  OPL_LINES.ORG_ID,
  OPL_LINES.ORDERED_ITEM,
  OPL_LINES.ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
  OPL_LINES.ITEM_CATEGORY,
  OPL_LINES.LINE_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.LINE_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,
  OPL_LINES.ORDERED_QUANTITY,
  OPL_LINES.OFFER_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.EXT_NET_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.UNIT_NET_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.CHARGE_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.PRICE_LIST_VERSION,
  OPL_LINES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID,
  OPL_LINES.INSTALL_SITEUSE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.LINK_TO_LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
  OPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
  OPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
  OPL_LINES.PROVISION_REFERENCE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.REFERENCED_ID,
  OPL_LINES.PROVISION_REQUIRED,
  OPL_LINES.ACTION_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.ACTION_SUB_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.SELL_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.MONTHLY_RECURRING_REVENUE,
  OPL_LINES.INITIAL_TERM,
  OPL_LINES.RENEWAL_TERM,
  OPL_LINES.PREPAY_TERM,
  OPL_LINES.TRUE_UP_TERM,
  OPL_LINES.INITIAL_TERM_TO,
  OPL_LINES.PREPAY_TERM_TO,
  OPL_LINES.TERM_LENGTH,
  OPL_LINES.QUOTE_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.REQUESTED_START_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.CONTRACT_START_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.CONTRACT_END_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.CHARGE_START_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.CHARGE_END_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.ESTIMATED_START_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.MANUAL_ACCEPTED_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_USE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOID,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEID,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
  OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_CHANNELID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBECOUNTRYID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_PGTMVBEGEOSITEID,
  OPL_LINES.SHIP_TO_CHANNELID,
  OPL_LINES.CREATION_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.CREATED_BY,
  OPL_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  OPL_LINES.CANCELLATION_REASON,
  OPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_FLAG,
  OPL_LINES.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
  OPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_MSG,
  OPL_LINES.RATE_TABLE_URL,
  OPL_LINES.PO_LINE_REFERENCE,
  OPL_LINES.CONTRACT_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.SERVICE_END_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.SERVICE_START_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.LICENSE_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.BUNDLE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.EXTENDED_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
  OPL_LINES.BUNDLE_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.FULFILLMENT_SYSTEM,
  OPL_LINES.ADVANCE_DRAWDOWN_AMOUNT,
  OPL_LINES.BUSINESS_SCENARIO,
  OPL_LINES.ECC_NUM,
  OPL_LINES.LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
  OPL_LINES.RENEW_COUNTER,
  OPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NPI_INCL_CREDITS,
  OPL_LINES.FULFILLMENT_METHOD,
  OPL_LINES.AUTO_ACCEPT,
  OPL_LINES.LEADTIME_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NET_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.ESHIP_CONFIRM_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.ACTIVATION_SYSTEM,
  OPL_LINES.RENEW_LEADTIME_IN_DAYS,
  OPL_LINES.BUNDLE_LINE,
  OPL_LINES.MONTHLY_SUB_CREDITS,
  OPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDITS,
  OPL_LINES.RENEW_LEADTIME_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.MONTHLY_NP_EXCL_CREDIT,
  OPL_LINES.UNIT_NETPRICE_INCL_CREDIT,
  OPL_LINES.END_COMPLETED_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.ORIGIN_SERVER,
  OPL_LINES.IMRR,
  OPL_LINES.LEGACY_UNIQUE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.LINE_REF_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_LINE_REF_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.ARR,
  OPL_LINES.NRR,
  OPL_LINES.ON_PREMISE_ROLE,
  OPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_NUMBER,
  OPL_LINES.REMOVED_LINE_FLAG,
  OPL_LINES.BILLING_MODEL ,
  OPL_LINES.ERP_LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.TRANSACTION_SOURCE,
  OPL_LINES.HYBRID_OFFER_FLG,
  OPL_LINES.CONFIG_ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO,
  OPL_LINES.REQUESTED_START_DTM,
  OPL_LINES.MAPPED_SOFTWARE_PRODUCT,
  OPL_LINES.ROUNDED_UNIT_NET_PRICE  ,/* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */
  OPL_LINES.PRICING_TERM    ,         /* SIGORANT ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY19 */
  OPL_LINES.ORIG_LINE_REF_NUMBER ,/* Added as part of Revenue Accruals Q2FY19 */
  /*ADDED AS PART OF Q4FY19 EA MIGRATION - SIGORANT*/
  OPL_LINES.MIGRATION_FLAG ,    
  OPL_LINES.MIGRATED_SO_NUMBER , 
  OPL_LINES.MIGRATED_SO_LINE_ID, 
  OPL_LINES.MIGRATED_DEAL_ID,  
   /*BELOW COLUMNS ADDED AS A PART OF jUNE2019 Try and Buy RELEASE*/
  OPL_LINES.CANCEL_TYPE,
  OPL_LINES.TRIAL_PERIOD_DURATION,
  OPL_LINES.EXPIRATION_DATE,
  OPL_LINES.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
  OPL_LINES.RTR_ELIGIBLE,
  OPL_LINES.TRUE_FORWARD_FLAG,
  OPL_LINES.SALES_MOTION_CD,
  OPL_LINES.APPLIED_BUYING_PROGRAM,
  OPL_LINES.ELA_FLG,
  OPL_LINES.TRANSFER_FLAG,
  OPL_LINES.SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.SK_ACQ_CAPTURED_ORDER_LINE_ID,
  OPL_LINES.ORIGINAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.ORIGINAL_EXT_LIST_PRICE,
  OPL_LINES.REMAINING_TERM, /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
  OPL_LINES.PREVIOUS_REMAINING_TERM /* Q4FY20_Annuity_June*/
    /* ADDED AS A PART OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
  ,OPL_LINES.ACV_FLAG
  ,OPL_LINES.ACV_ELIGIBLE_FLAG
  ,OPL_LINES.ACV_AMOUNT  
  /* END OF Q1FY21 ACV SCALE*/
  ,OPL_LINES.TERM_START_DATE
  ,OPL_LINES.TERM_END_DATE
  ,OPL_LINES.TERM_BOUND_CREDIT /* Q1FY21 Annuity Rel */
  ,OPL_LINES.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLG  /* Added as part BSFT Q1FY21 Release*/
  ,OPL_LINES.CANCELLED_FLAG
  ,OPL_LINES.REQUEST_DATE
  ,OPL_LINES.SHIPMENT_NUMBER
  ,OPL_LINES.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE
  ,OPL_LINES.OPTION_NUMBER 
  ,OPL_LINES.ORDER_NUMBER
  ,OPL_LINES.SHIPPING_METHOD_CODE
  ,OPL_LINES.CISCO_SHIP_CONFIRM_DATE
,COALESCE(OPL_LINES.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE, 'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(OPL_LINES.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0.000000)
,COALESCE(OPL_LINES.CANCELLED_QUANTITY, 0.000000)
,OPL_LINES.PRICING_QTY_TO
,OPL_LINES.INVOICED_QUANTITY
,OPL_LINES.CX_SUPPORT_TYPE_NAME
,OPL_LINES.RELATED_SKU_NAME
 /*Q3FY21 annuity release*/ 
,OPL_LINES.RETRO_CANCELLATION_DATE    
,OPL_LINES.RETRO_UNUSED_TERM
,OPL_LINES.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE
,OPL_LINES.ITEM_TYPE /* CBM changes */
,OPL_LINES.EARLY_RENEWAL_FLG /*Q3FY21 annuity release*/ 
/* ADDED BELOW TWO AS PART OF CBM MAY REL */
,OPL_LINES.MFG_PO_ORG_ID
,OPL_LINES.SHIP_FROM_ORGID_CLOUD
/* Added as part of Athena June REl*/
,OPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_FULFILLMENT_MAPPING
,OPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_MODEL
,OPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_BUNDLE_TYPE
,OPL_LINES.CONSUMPTION_PERCENTAGE
,OPL_LINES.SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP_ID   /*Added as part of Athen Sep release */
,OPL_LINES.FLEXUP_FLAG
,OPL_LINES.ENT_AGREEMENT_ID
,OPL_LINES.ENT_AGRMNT_COMMITMENT_TYP_NM
,OPL_LINES.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_SUITE_DISC_PCT
,OPL_LINES.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_POOL_DISC_PCT
,OPL_LINES.ENT_AGRMNT_MULTI_ENRL_DISC_PCT
,OPL_LINES.REFERENCE_TRANSACTION_ID  /* Added as part of Q1FY22 Annuity Oct release --mahhr*/
,CASE WHEN OPL_LINES.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG = 'Yes' THEN 'Y'
   ELSE COALESCE(OPL_LINES.SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG,'N') END SUBS_RNW_TERM_CHANGE_FLAG
,OPL_LINES.USER_INTENT /* SMR Nov-FY22 */
,OPL_LINES.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,OPL_LINES.THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM /* ATHENA Nov-FY22 */
,OPL_LINES.ATR_LINK_ID  /*feb13th iACV*/
,OPL_LINES.SK_EA_DIGITIZATION_PROPOSAL_ID /*feb13th iACV*/
,OPL_LINES.FREIGHT_CHARGE_LCL_AMT /*Added as part of CBM March Rel*/
,OPL_LINES.TOPMODEL_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*This Column is Added for GROGU March Release*/
,OPL_LINES.PLAN_NAME /*This Column is Added for GROGU March Release*/
,OPL_LINES.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
,OPL_LINES.PARENT_LINE_REF_NUMBER
,OPL_LINES.RELATED_LINE_REF_NUMBER /*added as part of Firestorm & Omega March 23 release*/
,OPL_LINES.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_FLAG
,OPL_LINES.ANCHOR_CONTRACT_NUMBER
,OPL_LINES.LAST_PRODUCT_SHIP_CONFIRMDATE
,OPL_LINES.ESTIMATE_ID
,OPL_LINES.COVERED_PRODUCT_LINE_ID
,OPL_LINES.REVENUE_SOURCE_CODE
,OPL_LINES.SPLIT_BY_SOURCE
,OPL_LINES.END_CUSTOMER_NOTES
,OPL_LINES.ACTION /*Added as part of EPIC 8216 */
,OPL_LINES.PRICE_PROTECTION
,OPL_LINES.ITEM_QUANTITY_CHANGE
,OPL_LINES.TRANSACTION_TYPE
/*added below attributes as part of AIP Splunk June 2025 release*/ 
,OPL_LINES.EXCEPTION_DESCRIPTION
,OPL_LINES.PARTNER_INVOLVEMENT 
,OPL_LINES.INVOICE_DATE
,OPL_LINES.CHANGE_SUBTYPE
,OPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_PROGRAM
,OPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_PROVIDER
,OPL_LINES.RENEWAL_TYPE
,OPL_LINES.MARKETPLACE_AGREEMENT_ID
,OPL_LINES.TRANSACTION_CODE
  FROM
   $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_LNS_ALL OPL_LINES
   WHERE LINE_ID NOT IN
   (SELECT LINE_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL)
